about_item: Large Dog Crate Furniture: Petrova large dog Kennel furniture (46.5”×22.8”×28.3”) offers roomy comfort for big dogs. This stylish indoor dog kennel doubles as a sturdy TV stand or end table with a stable wood base for everyday use.

Corner-Friendly Triple Door Design: Petrova furniture dog kennel features a sliding front door and two side doors for versatile placement. Use it as a corner dog crate or centerpiece—perfect for saving space while keeping dogs secure and calm.

Heavy-Duty & Chew-Resistant Crate: Built for strength, Petrova wooden dog crate furniture includes 0.4" thick steel bars for large or high-energy dogs. Durable and chew-proof, it's ideal for long-term use with extra large breeds or escape artists.

Personalized Indoor Dog Crate: Customize your furniture-style dog kennel with a bone-shaped name tag. Write on it, stick photos, or add stickers to show off your dog’s personality. A fun and unique touch to your home and pet space!

Easy Setup & Reliable Support: Petrova furniture dog crate includes step-by-step assembly video instructions. Backed by strong product testing and reliable after-sales team—enjoy peace of mind and a hassle-free experience.

summary.text: Customers find the dog crate to be a quality piece of furniture that is sturdy and nice-looking. They appreciate its size, with one customer noting it holds two 35 lb cattle dogs, and another mentioning it's roomy for Boston Terriers. They like the adjustability, with one review highlighting the smooth gliding door that can be opened from either side. Assembly experiences are mixed, with some finding the instructions easy to follow while others report poor assembly experiences.

authors_reviews.title: Stylish, Functional, and Very Well Made
authors_reviews.text: I am extremely happy with the Petrova 34-inch Wooden Dog Crate Furniture. It blends beautifully with my home décor and doesn’t look like a traditional dog crate at all—it truly functions as a piece of furniture. The wood construction feels sturdy and heavy-duty, giving me peace of mind that it’s secure for my small dog.The built-in LED light is a great touch and adds a nice ambiance, especially in the evening. I also love the two stainless steel food bowls, which are easy to remove and clean. The extra hooks are very convenient for leashes, collars, or accessories and help keep everything organized.Another standout feature is how well-ventilated and comfortable the kennel is for my dog. Assembly was straightforward with clear instructions, and everything fit together perfectly.Overall, this is a hidden decorative pet cage that offers both style and practicality. If you’re looking for a dog crate that looks elegant, saves space, and keeps your pet comfortable, I highly recommend this product!
authors_reviews.author: Nicola Bell

authors_reviews.title: Such a great crate…
authors_reviews.text: I got this for our 65# collie so we could have his crate in our living room and give us a table. I am very pleased with it. It looks nice, is larger and more comfortable for our dog. Seems well built. It can be opened from either the side or the front so it’s versatile. The dog is much happier when he’s crated plus he’s with us most of the time now since it’s part of our living room furniture.My only issue is that it’s taller than I’d realized but that’s an issue with me not really looking at the measurements. Odin loves the extra height so all is good.
authors_reviews.author: Karen A.

authors_reviews.title: Good crate for small dogs, bad wheel positioning
authors_reviews.text: this is a good size crate for small dogs, I have dachshunds and is fine. Would like a little bit taller but is fine. The wheels are difficult to access for locking and unlocking as they are positioned to far back from edges is the only downfall.
authors_reviews.author: E and J

authors_reviews.title: Quality Plus
authors_reviews.text: Yes, yes, yes. I couldn’t be any happier with this beautiful piece of furniture. The company, Petrova, did an outstanding job of packaging all the pieces carefully. They made sure that the wood pieces would arrive without scratches. All of the many parts were labeled and in separate packages. The instructions were easy to follow. Having three doors allows a person to be able to place the crate anywhere. It could fit in any room you want to place it. I love the front sliding barn door. I was looking for a front sliding barn door and I found it with this crate. The sliding barn door slides smoothly. The latches are tight so that an escape artist of a dog cannot open the doors. This is important. The dog crate looks like a quality piece of furniture. You will not regret buying this quality dog crate.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Very sturdy kennel
authors_reviews.text: Product is just as described. Lots of screws and stuff to put together. However everything lined up perfect. Only minor issue is I wish item were marked this end UP. It is high quality and sturdy. Love sliding front door. Highly recommend
authors_reviews.author: Sharon Mayewski

authors_reviews.title: AWESOME FIND!
authors_reviews.text: Super cute! Perfect for our 2 small dogs. Wheels make it easy to relocate and move around for cleaning. Nice quality. I put this together myself for the most part. When the instructions said you need another person you definitely need another person to help hold the pieces up while you screw in. All is done with an Allen wrench that’s included, however to be faster and easier on my hands I used a drill for the screws that would fit correctly. WORTH THE BUY! Also, the company sent a message upon delivery letting me know they are there 24/7 if I needed any assembly help or if I had any questions. Extra bonus! Directions were very easy to follow.
authors_reviews.author: Amber Kendra

authors_reviews.title: Great Quality crate!
authors_reviews.text: This crate is good quality and holds both of our 35 lb cattle dog/pit mix. It is the perfect size for them, they are able to stand up and turn around and spread out a bit. The divider is almost like a door and is removable if you want to use it as a single crate. Fast shipping. We love it!
authors_reviews.author: Courtney Young

authors_reviews.title: Slide door!
authors_reviews.text: Heavy duty, smooth gliding and very stylish. I was able to buy this and assemble alone but do be warned the instructions are a bit vague, I had to flip my top 180 when I was almost done so pay attention! but this gives my German/Aussie mix a good amount of room and comfort. The sliding door is smooth an fairly quiet.
authors_reviews.author: kya Gann
